seoTitle: South Wharf vs South Yarra — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between South Wharf and South Yarra. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: South Wharf vs South Yarra: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in South Wharf and South Yarra.
heading: South Wharf vs South Yarra — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between South Wharf, Victoria and South Yarra, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: South Wharf has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to South Yarra (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is South Wharf or South Yarra safer from flooding?
faq.answer: South Wharf has a flood risk score of 23/100, while South Yarra scores 21/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: South Wharf scores 57/100 for bushfire risk. South Yarra scores 49/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in South Wharf or South Yarra?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. South Wharf has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.92% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
